definition:
1. to be  or become full , τινός of a thing, (Euripides):—; absolute, ἀγορῆς πληθυούσης, see. ἀγορά V.:—;of rivers, to swell, rise , (Herdotus Historicus):—;so in Mid., (Herdotus Historicus) 
2. to increase in number, multiply , (Aeschulus Tragicus) 
3. to abound , τινί in  a thing, (Sophocles Tragicus) 
4. to be general, prevail , Lat. invalescere, of reports, (Aeschulus Tragicus); ὁ πληθύων χρόνος increasing  time, age, (Sophocles Tragicus) (ML)
